title: Frontend Batch 17 - Admin List Text and Link Fallback Reinforcement
summary: Reinforced admin blog/work table and admin dashboard list text/link fallbacks for malformed item values.
behaviorBugsFound: Admin blog table rendering could crash when a malformed item contained tags: null.
Admin table and dashboard list titles could render as empty UI when malformed item titles were nullish.
Admin table and dashboard edit links could include /null when malformed item ids were nullish.
Admin public view links could include raw unsafe-looking slug text instead of an encoded path segment.
Work table category and thumbnail alt text could use nullish/raw title values without a user-facing fallback.

validation.command: npx skills find react admin link fallback testing
validation.notes: React/admin skills found; no new skill installed.

validation.result: failed before fixes, passed after fixes

remainingGaps: Admin list delete flows still assume malformed ids should not be submitted.
Admin list fetch failure UI remains outside this batch.
Admin dashboard collection search behavior with malformed tag/category payloads is not covered as a standalone assertion.
Text and route normalization logic is duplicated in multiple admin components.
recommendation: Proceed to Frontend Batch 18 - Admin Mutation Guard and Fetch Failure Reinforcement.
